label: plain_text
text:
Imagine you are living thousands of years ago in a small
agricultural
settlement along
the banks of the Saraswati
river. You have a herd
ofc
cattle. Every r
morning, they go out into the dense
forests to graze,
and
every
evening, they 
return. How
do
that a calf has
you ensure
not wandered off? Without words for numbers, and without written
symbols, early humans solved this through a concept called one-to-one
correspondence.
